title: Upon A Painted Gentlewoman
content:
Men say you're fair; and fair ye are, 'tis true;
But, hark! we praise the painter now, not you.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon A Painted Gentlewoman", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
